sourceTitle: Academic integrity | Current students | University of Bristol
evidenceSnippetOriginal: We consider the use of AI or translation tools to be cheating if used for more than: generating the occasional short phrase within a sentence, checking basic grammar and spelling. Some assessments may allow more comprehensive use of these tools, but this will be detailed in your assessment instructions.
evidenceSnippetDisplay: AI use beyond occasional phrases and grammar checking is cheating
evidenceLocator: Section: Academic integrity, paragraph on AI and translation tools
